is_charging.description: Whether the battery is currently charging

id.description: The exact ID of the destination to go to.

name.description: The exact string name of the destination to go to.

is_emergency_stopped.description: Whether the robot is emergency stopped

is_position_hold.description: Whether the robot is in position hold mode

active_additional_actions.description: List of active additional safety actions

enforced_action_severity_level.description: Severity level of enforced safety action

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

id.description: A value that uniquely identifies this feature.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

base_station_distance.description: Distance to base station in meters

fix_status.description: GPS fix quality. Fixed = RTK fixed (highest accuracy). Float = RTK float (converging). 3D Fix = standard GNSS, no RTK. None = no fix or GPS device unresponsive.

localization_status.description: Robot's confidence in its position estimate. good = confidently localized. uncertain = degraded but available. lost = cannot determine position.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

coordinates.description: Array of coordinates for the LineString.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

heading.description: Robot heading in degrees, where 0 is north, 90 is east, 180 is south, and 270 is west

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted datetime with microseconds and timezone (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.ssssss±HH:MM)

properties.description: Implementor convenience to place non-execution metadata.

MotionGovernorState.description: Aggregated state of the motion governing system. Controls autonomous motion and reflects obstacle and fault states.

autonomous_motion_enabled.description: Whether autonomous motion is currently globally enabled. False when in a stop state, in a non-autonomous operating mode, or manually disabled via stop button.

state.description: Current motion state. OK = nominal. SLOWDOWN = speed reduced. STOP = motion halted.

state_reasons.description: Active reasons for the current motion state. Empty when nominal. Possible values: POWER_SAVING_MODE_STOP (idle timeout), WATCHDOG_TIMEOUT_STOP (messaging timeout / disconnected sensor), OBSTACLE_STOP, FAULT_STOP, PAUSE_STOP (paused between tasks or by stop button), OBSTACLE_SLOWDOWN, FAULT_SLOWDOWN.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

coordinates.description: Array of arrays of coordinates for the MultiLineString.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

coordinates.description: Array of coordinates for the MultiPoint.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

coordinates.description: Array of arrays of arrays of coordinates for the MultiPolygon.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

obstacle_slowdown_types.description: Types of obstacles causing slowdown behavior. Empty when no slowdown. Same values as obstacle_stop_types.

obstacle_stop_types.description: Types of obstacles causing stop behavior. Empty when no stop. PERSON_NEARBY = person in proximity. OTHER = generic obstacle.

state.description: Current obstacle handling state. NO_OBSTACLE = clear path. DETECTED_OBSTACLE = obstacle requires stop. DETECTED_SLOWDOWN = obstacle requires slowdown. FAULT = detection system fault (e.g. sensor not publishing).

angle.description: Angle (in radians) of the robot's heading relative to the nearest node on the path

route_error.description: Whether there is a route error

software_version.description: Software version with optional release phase

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the coordinate range of the object.

coordinates.description: Array of arrays of coordinates for the Polygon.

type.description: Specifies the type of GeoJSON object.

id.description: The unique identifier for the retrace task

mission_id.description: ID of the mission to play

reachable_destinations_count.description: Number of reachable destinations from the robot's current pose

properties.description: Optional, implementor convenience to place non-execution metadata.

type.description: Discriminates what type of Task this is, determines shape of parameters.

properties.description: Optional, implementor convenience to place non-execution metadata.

type.description: Discriminates what type of Task this is, determines shape of parameters.

parameters.description: Transition-specific parameters. Required for AfterDurationTransition: { duration_sec: number }.

type.description: WaitForInputTransition = robot holds at the destination until a play command is received. AfterDurationTransition = robot automatically advances after `parameters.duration_sec` seconds.

info.description: The Burro BOSS API allows implementors to authenticate themselves, query and manage Robots and Missions, pull Networks and related geospatial resources, and configure Webhooks.
info.title: Burro BOSS API

post.description: Returns an Access Token and a Refresh Token given valid email and password credentials. The email and password should be included in the request body as JSON.

Registers a new user with the given email and password, or logs in if the email is already registered. Returns an Access Token and a Refresh Token. The email and password should be included in the request body as JSON. Any user may register, but to access specific Customer information, contact Support to receive an API Key.

get.description: Returns a new Access Token given a valid Refresh Token from prior authentication. The Refresh Token must be included in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. The response will include a new Access Token and a new Refresh Token.
get.summary: Refreshes Access Token using Refresh Token.

get.description: Returns a list of Networks associated with the authenticated User. You can optionally include query parameters to specify pagination options.
get.summary: Get all Networks for the authenticated User.

get.description: Returns a specific Network associated with the authenticated User, including all Destinations, Paths, and Stations.
get.summary: Get a specific Network for the authenticated User.

get.description: Returns a list of Destinations associated with a specific Network. You can optionally include query parameters to specify pagination options.
get.summary: Get all Destinations for a specific Network.

get.description: Returns a list of Paths associated with a specific Network. You can optionally include query parameters to specify pagination options.
get.summary: Get all Paths for a specific Network.

get.description: Returns a list of Stations associated with a specific Network. You can optionally include query parameters to specify pagination options.
get.summary: Get all Stations for a specific Network.

get.description: Returns a list of Robots associated with the authenticated User. You can optionally include query parameters to specify which status fields to include in the response.
get.summary: Get all Robots for the authenticated User.

get.description: Returns a Robot associated with the authenticated user by serial number. You can optionally include query parameters to specify which status fields to include in the response.

post.description: Loads a Mission to the Robot. The Mission will be created if it does not exist, or updated if it does exist. The Mission will not be started until the /play endpoint is called.

requestBody.description: The Mission to load to the Robot.

post.summary: Load a mission to the Robot.

post.description: Starts a Mission on the Robot. The Mission must be loaded first using the /load endpoint.
post.summary: Plays a mission on the Robot.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Webhooks associated with the authenticated User. You can optionally include query parameters to specify pagination options.
get.summary: Get all Webhooks for the authenticated User.

post.description: Creates a new Webhook associated with the authenticated User. The request body should include the URL to which the webhook will send POST requests when triggered, as well as an optional description. Returns the created Webhook entity.
post.summary: Create a new Webhook for the authenticated User.

post.description: Triggers a test Webhook associated with the authenticated User. The Webhook to trigger is identified by the webhookId path parameter. The Webhook will receive a test payload with event "webhook.test" and a sample message.
post.summary: Trigger a test Webhook for the authenticated User.

delete.description: Deletes a specific Webhook associated with the authenticated User. The Webhook to delete is identified by the webhookId path parameter.
delete.summary: Delete a specific Webhook for the authenticated User.
